targetQuery: if you borrow $20,000 for 5 years at an annual rate of 8%, what would the monthly payment be
evidenceSource: GSC: position 7.1, 9 impressions, 0 clicks — snippet shows answer ($405.53) rather than CTA
serpIntent: Calculator intent — users want their own personalized monthly payment, not a static answer
competitorWeakness: Calculator.net shows generic answer without interactive calculator embed

titleMetaDecision.title: Restructured: moved CTA above answer, removed answer from snippet-visible content
titleMetaDecision.rationale: The previous structure put the exact answer ($405.53) in the first H2, which Google showed as snippet. Users got their answer without clicking. Now CTA appears first.

pageTypeDecision: IMPROVE_EXISTING — fix blog CTA to convert position 7.1 impressions
